title: rinorea belalongii
intro: Rinorea belalongii, also known as the Belalong kidney wood, is a species of flowering plant in the family Violaceae. It is native to Borneo and has been traditionally used in the region for its medicinal properties. The plant has been found to possess anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, which can be beneficial in treating various health conditions, including fever, rheumatism, and digestive issues. Rinorea belalongii can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or decoctions, and is also used in traditional medicine to promote overall health and well-being.
